things.name: Goree Island (Ile de Goree)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage slave trade island with the haunting Maison des Esclaves

things.name: African Renaissance Monument
things.description: 49m bronze statue - Africa's largest - on a hilltop overlooking Dakar and the Atlantic

things.name: IFAN Museum of African Arts
things.description: West Africa's finest collection of traditional masks, sculpture and textiles

things.name: Corniche Beach & Almadies Cape
things.description: Atlantic cliffs and beaches at Africa's westernmost point

things.name: Grand Mosque of Dakar
things.description: 1964 mosque built with Moroccan craftsmen with a 67m minaret

things.name: Marche Kermel & Sandaga Market
things.description: Art deco covered market with produce and the nearby Sandaga general market

things.name: Pink Lake (Lac Rose)
things.description: Bubblegum-pink lake 35km north of Dakar - the finish line of the Paris-Dakar Rally

things.name: Ngor Island
things.description: 15-minute pirogue ride to a traditional fishing island with restaurants and surf breaks

things.name: Village des Arts
things.description: Artist studios open to the public in a complex of workshops

things.name: Thieboudienne Fish Stew
things.description: Senegal's national dish - fish and rice cooked in tomato and herb sauce
